title: Harris Essentials All Multi Purpose Paint Brush 5in
features: Essentials large flat 5 inch rectangular brush for use with all paints
The ideal brush for cleaning or painting large rough surfaces applying watered down PVA to repair wall damage or for single use with harsher wall treatments
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Essentials All Purpose Brush - 5" Whats Included Contents 1 x 4" All Purpose Brush 5" Harris Essentials All Purpose Brush What's it for? Our Essentials Flat 5" Brush really is an all-rounder. The flat brush is perfect for most jobs around the house and can be used with any paint when decorating a indoor spaces such as your living room & bedroom and it's even good for use on large rough surfaces on jobs outside or in the garden. For best use follow the manufacturers care and cleaning instructions A versatile brush This all-purpose paintbrush is ideal for cleaning and painting large surfaces, repairing walls and applying treatment to interior or exterior surfaces. Harris Painting & Decorating Tools Ranges Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier.
